creator: bapt@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can see your message being accepted:

Thu Jul 28 06:45:27 2022 mlmmj-process: access - A mail from "yuri@FreeBSD.org" with header "Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8; format=flowed" was allowed by rule #5 "allow ^Content-Type: text/plain"

and I can see it in the archive so no, it is not lost:

https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-ports/2022-July/002297.html

As for the 2 messages in June, I can see one of it:
Wed Jun 15 03:20:20 2022 mlmmj-process: access - A mail from "yuri@FreeBSD.org" with header "X-Spamd-Bar: +++++" was denied by rule #1 "deny ^X-Spamd-Bar: \+\+\+"

I don't know how to look into rspamd to see what flagged it as spam

Same for the second one:
Fri Jun 17 15:50:22 2022 mlmmj-process: access - A mail from "yuri@FreeBSD.org" with header "X-Spamd-Bar: +++++++" was denied by rule #1 "deny ^X-Spamd-Bar: \+\+\+"
